measurements.claim: The eighteenth-wave packet shifts current outreach focus away from GitHub and toward funding, Reddit, YouTube, forums, and broader developer communities unless an active maintainer/CI response requires GitHub attention.
evidence: EIGHTEENTH-WAVE-NON-GITHUB-OUTREACH-ACTION-PACKET-2026-07-02.md states GitHub work is paused unless an active reply, review, CI failure, or maintainer request requires response
the packet purpose lists funding, Reddit, YouTube, forums, developer communities, grant programs, and feedback loops

measurements.claim: The packet records current Telos tool evidence including Gather 1.5.0 MATCH, Index 2.8.0 MATCH, Forum 1.12.0 MATCH, Crucible 1.1.0 MATCH, Telos room 5 of 5 ready, and 70 available protocol tools.
evidence: telos_room returned MATCH with ready 5 total 5 and tools 70
telos_operator_doctor returned MATCH with 14 of 14 checks passed

measurements.claim: The packet treats Reddit and YouTube comments as ready-to-confirm external side effects, not as already submitted posts.
evidence: the packet says public posts, comments, forms, and funding submissions remain external side effects
the packet includes a confirmation prompt requiring exact destination and exact text
the packet says do not submit public social comments without exact final confirmation

measurements.claim: The funding section updates active paths with current public-source constraints: OpenAI Cybersecurity Grant/Trusted Access is high-readiness defensive funding; Patch the Planet is a maintainer-support positioning path; NLnet is temporarily narrowed to Taler/Fediversity while CodeSupply is prepare-only; FLOSS/fund requires a public funding manifest and has license/maturity blockers; MOSS is parked as inactive.
evidence: OpenAI grant section lists defensive-only positioning and missing applicant/resource fields
Patch the Planet section says do not claim partnership
NLnet/CodeSupply section says general proposals are temporarily narrowed and CodeSupply is prepare-only
FLOSS/fund section says submission makes the manifest public and lists contact/license/maturity blockers
Mozilla section says MOSS applications are closed and on indefinite hiatus

measurements.claim: The first social submission set includes eight exact comments across Reddit and YouTube, with no more than one link-bearing comment in the first batch.
evidence: the first social submission set includes Reddit R1, R2, R4, R5, R7 and YouTube Y1, Y4, Y5
only Y4 includes the GitHub repository link in the first batch
